name: quota-sentry
description: Codex quota guard that monitors the 5-hour usage window and waits near reset.

interface.shortDescription: Monitor Codex quota and wait before the 5-hour window is exhausted.
interface.longDescription: Quota Sentry is a local Codex helper that uses codexbar to monitor the Codex 5-hour quota window, runs a background poller every minute, and provides a synchronous guard command for Codex hooks or wrappers to wait until reset when usage reaches the configured threshold.
defaultPrompt: Set up Quota Sentry for Codex.
Check my Codex quota guard status.
